# Get AI Discounts

> The premium directory of verified promo codes and exclusive discounts for the world's leading AI tools — Midjourney, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, ChatGPT, Cursor, and 100+ more.

Get AI Discounts curates hand-picked, hand-checked deals on AI tools across video, voice, writing, coding, music, image, and agent categories. Available in 9 languages.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse all live AI tool discounts and promo codes.
- [Video AI](/video): Discounts on AI video generators, editors, and avatar tools.
- [Voice AI](/voice): Deals on voice cloning, text-to-speech, and dubbing platforms.
- [Writing AI](/writing): Promo codes for AI writing assistants and copywriters.
- [Code AI](/code): Discounts for AI coding assistants, IDEs, and pair-programmers.
- [Music AI](/music): Savings on AI music generators and mastering tools.
- [AI Agents](/agents): Deals on autonomous AI agents and assistants.
- [Group-Buy & Sharing](/groupbuy): Split costs on premium AI tools.
